summary: Well-organized test suite with comprehensive module coverage and strong end-to-end integration testing via act. Parser, aggregator, and formatter tests cover the happy path thoroughly with good scenario variety. Workflow tests validate structure, actionlint compliance, and execute the full pipeline with exact expected value assertions. However, rigor is limited by insufficient edge case testing (malformed XML/JSON, special characters in names, boundary values, zero/negative durations, error path coverage). The act test is valuable but tests only one successful scenario. Would catch most core functionality regressions but risks missing boundary conditions and error handling failures.
